description: One participant's local high-fidelity recording from a studio session, stored as ordered audio chunks. This is the 'double-ender' keeper track (each browser records its own mic at full quality), NOT the lossy WebRTC mesh used for live monitoring.

session.description: AT-URI of the com.minomobi.podcast.session this track belongs to.

chunks.description: Ordered audio chunks. Concatenate in array order to reconstruct the track. Chunked because a full session exceeds a single PDS blob limit, and so partial uploads survive a mid-record crash.

durationMs.description: Total track duration in milliseconds (DAG-CBOR has no float type).

epochMs.description: Shared recording epoch the room broadcast when recording armed (server ms since Unix epoch). The common zero all tracks in a session align to.

localStartOffsetMs.description: Milliseconds between the shared epoch and when THIS track actually began capturing. Coarse alignment key for /prod.

clockSkewMs.description: Estimated drift of this client's audio clock vs the server, from NTP-style round-trips through the room coordinator. Fine drift correction (resample) in /prod.
